chapter 4
How to predict for elections –
There are few problems in this area. First of all getting
the horoscope of the political parties and that of the
political leaders is very difficult.
One will have to check the authencity of the leader’s
horoscope by correlating the events of that political
leader’s life with that of the dasa and bhukthi of their
horoscope.

I can tell in my experience 8 out of ten horoscope used in
celebrity predictions is wrong. For example finance
minister p chidambram horoscope is risbaha lagna whereas it
is given in the books as the mithuna lagna.
Elections can be classified.
